title: K1RBE Pack
description: Kirbe’s PvP texture pack (streams) optimized for clean visuals and competitive gameplay, featuring low fire, simplified items, and enhanced clarity for better combat performance.
body:
K1RBE Pack is a PvP-focused resource pack based on a fusion of packs used by Kirbe in livestreams and tier list PvP fights. It is designed to improve visibility, reduce visual clutter, and provide a smoother combat experience.

🔥 Features
Low fire for better visibility in fights
Clean and simplified textures
Optimized items for PvP clarity
Custom overlays (totem, shield, and more)
Enhanced visuals for competitive gameplay
🎯 Purpose

This pack is made for players who want a clearer and more optimized PvP experience, especially in fast-paced fights.

🧩 Contents
Custom fire textures (low fire)
Edited item textures (ender pearl, etc.)
Overlay improvements (totem, shield)
Sound adjustments
📸 Gallery

Check the gallery to see the in-game appearance of the pack, including item textures, overlays, and overall visual style.

🙏 Credits

This pack is a fusion of multiple packs and assets used by Kirbe:

k1rbe low fire
kesu small pop (totem overlay)
kesu shield overlay
testmastersigma (pink pearl)
other minor assets
